updated-context-files.description: Regenerated context files reflecting v6.2.0 codebase state (branding server, init branding step, update-reminder, src/commands router split)

version-strings.description: All active-file version references updated from v6.1.0/6.1.0 to v6.2.0/6.2.0 (both prefixed and bare forms)

pinned-runtime-deps.description: All runtime dependencies pinned to exact versions from package-lock.json: zod=3.25.76, ajv=8.18.0, ajv-formats=3.0.1, proper-lockfile=4.1.2 (no ^ or ~ prefixes). devDependencies are NOT in scope.

final-feature-state.signature: All branding-overhaul files merged to main
final-feature-state.description: Context files must reflect the final branding server architecture

final-init-state.description: Context files must reflect init flow with branding step

final-reminder-state.signature: All update-reminder files merged to main
final-reminder-state.description: Context files must reflect update reminder infrastructure

no-stale-versions.description: Zero remaining v6.1.0 or bare 6.1.0 version strings in active project files after completion. Exclusions: .planning/archive/**, node_modules/**, .git/**, ROADMAP.md, docs/CHANGELOG.md, .planning/v6.1.0-AUDIT.md, .planning/v6.1.0-UX-AUDIT.md, tests/ux-audit.test.cjs, .planning/sets/docs-and-housekeeping/**, src/lib/housekeeping.test.cjs, .archive/**, package-lock.json (transitive 6.1.0 versions from other npm deps are coincidental), and .planning/STATE.json (the latter is excluded because line 579 contains a preserved historical milestone id 'v6.1.0' inside the milestones[] array; line 3 rapidVersion IS bumped to 6.2.0 by Task 1).

runtime-deps-pinned.description: Every entry in package.json.dependencies uses an exact semver (matches /^\d+\.\d+\.\d+$/). Specifically: zod === '3.25.76', ajv === '8.18.0', ajv-formats === '3.0.1', proper-lockfile === '4.1.2'. devDependencies are not checked.

context-accuracy.description: All .planning/context/ files accurately describe the v6.2.0 codebase including branding modules, version.cjs staleness primitives, src/commands/ router split, and the 30-skill / 27-agent counts

definition.scope: Documentation updates and project housekeeping: regenerate .planning/context/ files for v6.2.0, bump all version strings v6.1.0 -> v6.2.0 (and bare 6.1.0 -> 6.2.0) in active non-archive files, pin all runtime deps (zod, ajv, ajv-formats, proper-lockfile) to exact versions, update .env.example with NO_UPDATE_NOTIFIER documentation. ROADMAP.md is OUT OF SCOPE (user directive -- handled separately).

tasks.description: Sweep v6.1.0 and bare 6.1.0 version strings to v6.2.0/6.2.0 across all active files (respecting the documented exclusion list)
tasks.acceptance: Grep for /v?6\.1\.0/ returns zero matches outside the exclusion list

tasks.description: Pin all runtime dependencies in package.json to exact versions (zod=3.25.76, ajv=8.18.0, ajv-formats=3.0.1, proper-lockfile=4.1.2)
tasks.acceptance: package.json dependencies block has no ^ or ~ prefixes and matches the exact pin targets

tasks.description: Document NO_UPDATE_NOTIFIER in .env.example with conventional usage
tasks.acceptance: .env.example includes a commented block describing the env var with example assignment

tasks.description: Add behavioral tests (no-stale-versions, runtime-deps-pinned) colocated under src/lib/
tasks.acceptance: npm test passes; new tests assert zero stale version strings and exact pins

tasks.description: Surgically patch .planning/context/ files for v6.2.0 (module counts, new modules, src/commands/ router split, skill counts, Node engine)
tasks.acceptance: Context files reflect 41 lib modules, 30 skills, 27 agents, the bin/router + src/commands handler split, branding-artifacts.cjs, branding-server.cjs, version.cjs staleness primitives, and Node >=22

acceptance: All tasks complete with passing tests
No stale v6.1.0 or bare 6.1.0 references remain outside the exclusion list
Context files accurately describe post-merge v6.2.0 state
